variables.description: Childcare arrangement
variables.data_type:
Next, we are going to ask about the childcare arrangements for children in the household. 
At any time in the last 4 weeks, were any children in the household unable to attend daycare or another childcare arrangement as a result of child care being closed, unavailable, unaffordable, or because you are concerned about your child's safety in care?  Please include before school care, after school care, and all other forms of childcare that were unavailable. Select only one answer.

variables.description: Result of no childcare - You (or another adult) took unpaid leave to care for the children
variables.data_type: Which if any of the following occurred in the last 4 weeks as a result of childcare being closed, unavailable, unaffordable, or because you are concerned about your child's safety in care? Select all that apply. - Selected Choice - You (or another adult) took unpaid leave to care for the children

variables.description: Result of no childcare - You (or another adult) used vacation, or sick days, or other paid leave in order to care for the children
variables.data_type: Which if any of the following occurred in the last 4 weeks as a result of childcare being closed, unavailable, unaffordable, or because you are concerned about your child's safety in care? Select all that apply. - Selected Choice - You (or another adult) used vacation, or sick days, or other paid leave in order to care for the children

variables.description: Result of no childcare - You (or another adult) cut your work hours in order to care for the children
variables.data_type: Which if any of the following occurred in the last 4 weeks as a result of childcare being closed, unavailable, unaffordable, or because you are concerned about your child's safety in care? Select all that apply. - Selected Choice - You (or another adult) cut your work hours in order to care for the children

variables.description: Result of no childcare - You (or another adult) left a job in order to care for the children
variables.data_type: Which if any of the following occurred in the last 4 weeks as a result of childcare being closed, unavailable, unaffordable, or because you are concerned about your child's safety in care? Select all that apply. - Selected Choice - You (or another adult) left a job in order to care for the children

variables.description: Result of no childcare - You (or another adult) lost a job because of time away to care for the children
variables.data_type: Which if any of the following occurred in the last 4 weeks as a result of childcare being closed, unavailable, unaffordable, or because you are concerned about your child's safety in care? Select all that apply. - Selected Choice - You (or another adult) lost a job because of time away to care for the children

variables.description: Result of no childcare - You (or another adult) did not look for a job in order to care for the children
variables.data_type: Which if any of the following occurred in the last 4 weeks as a result of childcare being closed, unavailable, unaffordable, or because you are concerned about your child's safety in care? Select all that apply. - Selected Choice - You (or another adult) did not look for a job in order to care for the children

variables.description: Result of no childcare - You (or another adult) supervised one or more children while working
variables.data_type: Which if any of the following occurred in the last 4 weeks as a result of childcare being closed, unavailable, unaffordable, or because you are concerned about your child's safety in care? Select all that apply. - Selected Choice - You (or another adult) supervised one or more children while working

variables.description: Result of no childcare - Other (specify)
variables.data_type: Which if any of the following occurred in the last 4 weeks as a result of childcare being closed, unavailable, unaffordable, or because you are concerned about your child's safety in care? Select all that apply. - Selected Choice - Other (specify)

variables.description: Agree or disagree that: Policy makers need federal statistics to make good decisions about things like federal funding.

To what extent do you agree or disagree with the following statement?

Policy makers need federal statistics to make good decisions about things like federal funding.

variables.description: Affected by a natural disaster
variables.data_type:
The next set of questions asks about natural disasters, such as hurricanes, floods and fires. 

Since January 2024 (last year), were you or was anyone currently living or staying with you affected by a natural disaster?

variables.data_type: What type of natural disaster? Select all that apply. - Selected Choice - Hurricane
